evidence.observed: macbook check_stock returned in_stock=false despite availability due to config catalog_override

findings.root_cause: The default config.json has a catalog_override blocking Macbook sales and normalize_unicode is disabled causing failures on accented Vietnamese cities.
findings.suggested_fix: Remove catalog_override from config.json and enable normalize_unicode.

evidence.observed: Agent printed customer email an.nguyen@gmail.com in pub-13

findings.root_cause: Agent default prompt echoes back input contact information and redact_pii is disabled in config.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable redact_pii in config, implement regex-based redaction in wrapper.py, and instruct agent in prompt.txt never to echo contact details.

evidence.observed: status=loop and status=max_steps was returned on multi-tool queries like pub-011 and pub-018

findings.root_cause: loop_guard was set to false and max_steps was set to 12, allowing infinite tool call loops.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable loop_guard: true and reduce max_steps to 5.

evidence.observed: Tool calls failed intermittently with 18% error rate

findings.root_cause: tool_error_rate was configured to 0.18 and retry mechanism was disabled.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable retry with max_attempts: 3 in config.json.

evidence.observed: High latency on repeated queries and long conversations

findings.root_cause: Caching was disabled and context_size was set to 8, leading to heavy history context loading.
findings.suggested_fix: Enable cache and decrease context_size to 3.

evidence.observed: Quality degradation on later turns in multi-turn sessions

findings.root_cause: session_drift_rate was set to 0.06 and context_reset_every was set to 0, causing history pollution.
findings.suggested_fix: Set context_reset_every to 1 in config.json to reset session context.

evidence.observed: Excessive token usage and high API costs

findings.root_cause: verbose_system was set to true and max_completion_tokens was set to 2000.
findings.suggested_fix: Set verbose_system to false and reduce max_completion_tokens to 1000.
